004 * this work for additional information regarding copyright ownership.

006 * (the "License"); you may not use this file except in compliance with
007 * the License.  You may obtain a copy of the License at
008 *

010 *

012 * distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,
013 * WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.

015 * limitations under the License.
016 */
017package org.apache.juneau.rest.server.springboot;
018
019import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.Utils.*;
020
021import java.util.*;
022import java.util.function.*;
023
024import org.apache.juneau.commons.inject.*;
025import org.apache.juneau.commons.settings.*;
026import org.springframework.context.*;
027
028/**
029 * A bean store that uses Spring bean resolution to find beans if they're not already in this store.
030 *
031 * <p>
032 * This implementation extends {@link BasicBeanStore} and delegates to Spring's {@link ApplicationContext}
033 * for bean resolution when beans are not found in the local store or parent stores.
034 *
035 * <h5 class='section'>Example:</h5>
036 * <p class='bjava'>
037 *    <jc>// Create a Spring bean store</jc>
038 *    ApplicationContext <jv>appContext</jv> = ...;
039 *    SpringBeanStore <jv>beanStore</jv> = <jk>new</jk> SpringBeanStore(<jv>appContext</jv>, <jk>null</jk>);
040 *
041 *    <jc>// Get bean from Spring context</jc>
042 *    Optional&lt;MyService&gt; <jv>service</jv> = <jv>beanStore</jv>.getBean(MyService.<jk>class</jk>);
043 *
044 *    <jc>// Get named bean from Spring context</jc>
045 *    Optional&lt;MyService&gt; <jv>namedService</jv> = <jv>beanStore</jv>.getBean(MyService.<jk>class</jk>, <js>"primary"</js>);
046 *
047 *    <jc>// Get all beans of a type from Spring context</jc>
048 *    Map&lt;String, MyService&gt; <jv>allServices</jv> = <jv>beanStore</jv>.getBeansOfType(MyService.<jk>class</jk>);
049 * </p>
050 *
051 * <h5 class='section'>See Also:</h5><ul>
052 *    <li class='link'><a class="doclink" href="https://juneau.apache.org/docs/topics/JuneauRestServerSpringbootBasics">juneau-rest-server-springboot Basics</a>
053 *    <li class='jc'>{@link BasicBeanStore}
054 *    <li class='jic'>{@link BeanStore}
055 * </ul>
056 */
057public class SpringBeanStore extends BasicBeanStore {
058
059   private final ApplicationContext appContext;
060
061   // Captured so clear() can deregister the bridge from the process-wide Settings singleton and
062   // avoid cross-test bleed when multiple Spring contexts come and go in the same JVM.
063   private final SpringEnvironmentPropertySource environmentSource;
064
065   /**
066    * Constructor.
067    *
068    * <p>
069    * If {@code appContext} is non-null, this constructor also installs a
070    * {@link SpringEnvironmentPropertySource} on the process-wide {@link Settings} singleton so that
071    * {@link org.apache.juneau.commons.inject.Value @Value("&#123;...&#125;")} placeholders resolve against
072    * the Spring {@link org.springframework.core.env.Environment Environment} (i.e. against
073    * {@code application.yaml}, env vars, system properties, etc.).  The source is removed by
074    * {@link #clear()}.
075    *
076    * @param appContext The Spring application context used to resolve beans. Can be <jk>null</jk>.
077    * @param parent The parent bean store. Can be <jk>null</jk>.
078    */
079   public SpringBeanStore(ApplicationContext appContext, BeanStore parent) {
080      super(parent);
081      this.appContext = appContext;
082      // Register a lazy bridge to Spring's Environment. The supplier form defers the
083      // appContext.getEnvironment() call to first @Value("${...}") lookup, so the constructor has
084      // no observable interaction with the application context — important for callers (and
085      // tests) that don't actually use Spring properties.  Null appContext means no bridge.
086      if (nn(appContext)) {
087         this.environmentSource = new SpringEnvironmentPropertySource(appContext::getEnvironment);
088         Settings.get().addSource(this.environmentSource);
089      } else {
090         this.environmentSource = null;
091      }
092   }
093
094   @Override
095   @SuppressWarnings({
096      "resource" // super.clear() returns this; the discarded return is the store we already own
097   })
098   public SpringBeanStore clear() {
099      super.clear();
100      if (nn(environmentSource))
101         Settings.get().removeSource(environmentSource);
102      return this;
103   }
104
105   @Override
106   public <T> Optional<T> getBean(Class<T> beanType) {
107      // Try local store first
108      var o = super.getBean(beanType);
109      if (o.isPresent())
110         return o;
111
112      // Fall back to Spring context
113      if (nn(appContext)) {
114         var bean = safeOpt(() -> appContext.getBeanProvider(beanType).getIfAvailable()).orElse(null);
115         return bean != null ? opt(bean) : opte();
116      }
117
118      return opte();
119   }
120
121   @Override
122   public <T> Optional<T> getBean(Class<T> beanType, String name) {
123      // Try local store first
124      var o = super.getBean(beanType, name);
125      if (o.isPresent())
126         return o;
127
128      // Fall back to Spring context
129      if (nn(appContext) && nn(name) && safeOpt(() -> appContext.containsBean(name)).orElse(false)) {
130         var bean = safeOpt(() -> appContext.getBean(name, beanType)).orElse(null);
131         return bean != null ? opt(bean) : opte();
132      }
133
134      return opte();
135   }
136
137   @Override
138   public <T> Map<String, T> getBeansOfType(Class<T> beanType) {
139      // Get beans from parent stores and local store
140      Map<String, T> result = super.getBeansOfType(beanType);
141
142      // Add beans from Spring context (if they don't already exist in the result)
143      if (nn(appContext)) {
144         safeOpt(() -> appContext.getBeansOfType(beanType)).ifPresent(springBeans -> springBeans.forEach(result::putIfAbsent));
145      }
146
147      return result;
148   }
149
150   @Override
151   public boolean hasBean(Class<?> beanType) {
152      // Check local store and parents first
153      if (super.hasBean(beanType))
154         return true;
155
156      // Check Spring context
157      if (nn(appContext)) {
158         return safeOpt(() -> appContext.getBeanNamesForType(beanType))
159            .map(beanNames -> beanNames.length > 0)
160            .orElse(false);
161      }
162
163      return false;
164   }
165
166   @Override
167   public boolean hasBean(Class<?> beanType, String name) {
168      // Check local store and parents first
169      if (super.hasBean(beanType, name))
170         return true;
171
172      // Check Spring context
173      if (nn(appContext) && nn(name)) {
174         return safeOpt(() -> appContext.containsBean(name) && appContext.isTypeMatch(name, beanType))
175            .orElse(false);
176      }
177
178      return false;
179   }
180
181   @Override
182   public <T> Optional<Supplier<T>> getBeanSupplier(Class<T> beanType) {
183      // Try local store and parents first
184      var supplier = super.getBeanSupplier(beanType);
185      if (supplier.isPresent())
186         return supplier;
187
188      // Return a supplier that delegates to Spring context
189      if (nn(appContext)) {
190         var providerOpt = safeOpt(() -> appContext.getBeanProvider(beanType));
191         if (providerOpt.isPresent()) {
192            var provider = providerOpt.get();
193            // Only return a supplier if the bean actually exists in Spring
194            if (provider.getIfAvailable() != null) {
195               return opt(provider::getIfAvailable);
196            }
197         }
198      }
199
200      return opte();
201   }
202
203   @Override
204   public <T> Optional<Supplier<T>> getBeanSupplier(Class<T> beanType, String name) {
205      // Try local store and parents first
206      var supplier = super.getBeanSupplier(beanType, name);
207      if (supplier.isPresent())
208         return supplier;
209
210      // Unnamed lookup: also consult Spring by type so beans like Environment are reachable when this
211      // SpringBeanStore is installed in the BasicBeanStore.overridingParent slot (which always passes
212      // name=null through the resolution chain).  Mirrors the unnamed getBeanSupplier(Class) branch
213      // without delegating to it (avoids polymorphic dispatch back into BasicBeanStore.getBeanSupplier
214      // which would loop).
215      if (name == null && nn(appContext)) {
216         var providerOpt = safeOpt(() -> appContext.getBeanProvider(beanType));
217         if (providerOpt.isPresent()) {
218            var provider = providerOpt.get();
219            if (provider.getIfAvailable() != null)
220               return opt(provider::getIfAvailable);
221         }
222         return opte();
223      }
224
225      // Return a supplier that delegates to Spring context
226      if (nn(appContext) && nn(name) && safeOpt(() -> appContext.containsBean(name) && appContext.isTypeMatch(name, beanType)).orElse(false)) {
227         return opt(() -> safeOpt(() -> appContext.getBean(name, beanType)).orElse(null));
228      }
229
230      return opte();
231   }
232}
233
